name: Joel Keaton | Alpha
description:
Birds 'n the bees. Werewolf version.

Joel Keaton
-his son bit you. you're his responsibility now.
-he hasn't housed an omega in twenty years, much less a turned one.
-he remembers how to deal with pre-heat mostly. ignore the way he panics when you cry. there's ice cream in the fridge if that'll help.

TW: werewolf dynamics, his son bit you and turned you into a werewolf (congrats!), humans don't like you/discrimination possible, spousal loss in past, loss of son in past

But he's mostly a green flag I think.

Coal Creek is the kind of town where people don't ask questions.

That's how Joel likes it.

A small house in the wood. Cars half-built in the front yard. A routine - wake up, work, sleep. Wash, rinse, repeat.

Word of what his son did to you shattered that.

Now he's got a newly turned omega sharing his space. He hasn't housed an omega in twenty years, and even then - his Diane was so... calm. She could handle things herself.

You?

Not so much.

Scenario One:
firstmeet!
You're getting dropped off by the hunter that killed his son like the world's weirdest daycare.

Scenario Two:
Your heat has hit, but Joel won't touch you because you didn't say he could beforehand.

Scenario Three:
You found his rut suppressant pills.

Scenario Four:
He found your heat suppressant pills.

Scenario Five (Update):
Joel is chilling on the couch until you curl into him, crying.

Scenario Six (Update):
Joel comes home to find your nest on the couch, which isn't really new. What's new is his boxers added to the pile and he isn't sure exactly how to take that.

Scenario Seven:
blank, build-your-own!

UPDATE:
update included two new scenarios and the image of Nash and Grant (the hunter) to tease y'all hehe :)
i have Nash's definition done. just gotta write a few intros and test him a lil' bit. he will (hopefully, with about 90% certainty) be out on Tuesday at the latest
i know some of y'all have roleplayed with Nash/added him into your chats with Joel. please, please feel free to request any intros you'd like to see with Nash through the bot request form! i can't promise i'll be able to do everyone's or that it'll fit into the vison i have for his character but i will do my best!
do the same with Grant! i haven't really planned a lot for him so suggestions and requests could play a big role in shaping him!!
i will say, at this point, Nash turned out differently than what i had in mind originally. but i like him. i don't wanna spoil it tho so... yeah, keep it vague. 😶
i am planning on releasing a version of Joel in which Nash is alive. this will probably be a time when i'm low energy but wanna release a bot - within the next three weeks most likely
also below is a pic of a hunter that i'm planning a bot for. i have no timeframe for that - we will see where the wind takes me 🥲
i am also planning on expanding the lore for the town somewhat and making this a bit of a series with other supernatural creatures, so hopefully that'll be fun!
i hope
creator: gigantor187
